name: Love Finder Profile
author: Poki
description: Love Finder Profile is a dress-up game created by Idea Studios. Create your character and choose from dozens of outfits and hairstyles to show off. Find a location with a nice background to take your pictures and fill your profile with amazing content. And of course, scroll through all your attractive suitors, chat with them... and find your true love! How to play? Use your mouse cursor to select, drag and move objects around. Who is the developer? Love Finder Profile is created by Idea Studio. Play some other of their games such as just-married-home-deco or ollie-goes-to-school on Poki!
